ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: URL for the background image to load.
ast.target: 要加载的背景图片的 URL。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Opacity of the background image should be between 0% and 100%.
ast.target: 背景图片的不透明度应在 0% 到 100% 之间。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Increasing the blur can help make the text more legible.
ast.target: 增加模糊度有助于使文本更清晰易读。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This adds a translucent background for the input area, to help improve legibility.
ast.target: 这为输入区域添加了一个半透明背景，以帮助提高可读性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Reposition the image in cases where the focus is not centered.
ast.target: 在焦点未居中的情况下重新定位图片。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Enable to increase the contrast of the input area.
ast.target: 启用以增加输入区域的对比度。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The URL needs to be a remote resource, and does not yet (or at least not on my machine) support local files.
ast.target: URL 需要是远程资源，目前（至少在我的机器上）还不支持本地文件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Some of the other settings, like opacity, bluriness, and input contrast, are helpers to tweak your experience.
ast.target: 其他一些设置，如不透明度、模糊度和输入对比度，是帮助您调整体验的辅助工具。
